name: Doomsday Debate Moderator
text:
Whenever a player would roll a die or flip a coin, the moderator first asks them to state their prediction out loud. If they refuse or get it wrong, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock.
{1}{W}{B}, {T}: Put the question to the table — each player secretly predicts the next coin flip, then flip a coin. Each player who guessed wrong loses 2 life; you gain 1 life for each. Time for rebuttals is, regrettably, up.
flavorText: "Candidate Eschaton, your platform is the apocalypse. Rebuttal?" "...Correct."

extras.interaction: forces predictions on all table gambling
